qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_carpeta as oi_carpeta, t0.c_carpeta as c_carpeta, t0.d_carpeta as d_carpeta, t0.c_criticidad as c_criticidad, t0.f_carpeta as f_carpeta, t0.l_instancia as l_instancia, t0.f_egreso as f_egreso, t0.c_accion as c_accion, t0.c_enlace as c_enlace, t0.d_custom_1 as d_custom_1, t0.d_custom_2 as d_custom_2, t0.d_custom_3 as d_custom_3, t0.d_custom_4 as d_custom_4, t0.d_custom_5 as d_custom_5, t0.l_cerrado as l_cerrado, t0.f_prescripcion as f_prescripcion, t0.c_seguridad as c_seguridad, t0.c_origen_carga as c_origen_carga, SEC.policy, t0.oi_carpeta as CODE, t0.d_carpeta as TEXT, t0.oi_estado_carpeta as oi_estado_carpeta, t0.oi_tipo_monto as oi_tipo_monto, t0.oi_sujeto as oi_sujeto, t0.oi_empresa as oi_empresa, t0.oi_ubicacion as oi_ubicacion, t0.oi_tipo_carpeta as oi_tipo_carpeta FROM LEG01_CARPETAS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Carpetas.CARPETA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_carpeta LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_carpeta asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_carpeta as oi_carpeta, SEC.policy FROM LEG01_CARPETAS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Carpetas.CARPETA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_carpeta LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_carpeta asc')/ROWS/ROW

assosiation.description: Contiene un historial de los estados que tuvo la carpeta
assosiation.label: Historial estados carpetas
assosiation.name: HIST_ESTADOS

assosiation.description: Contiene un historial de los estados que tuvo la carpeta
assosiation.label: Historial de Tipos de Carpeta
assosiation.name: HIST_TIPO_CAR

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Carpetas.CARPETA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Carpetas.CARPETA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta) as CNT from LEG01_CARPETAS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG01_CARPETAS.d_carpeta,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

method.label: Guarda la carpeta en los distintos pasos del Wizard
method.name: SAVE

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql (' SELECT LEG02_MONTOS.oi_monto, LEG02_PREVISIONES.oi_prevision FROM LEG02_MONTOS, LEG02_PREVISIONES JOIN LEG02_MONTOS.oi_monto LEFT OUTER LEG02_PREVISIONES.oi_monto WHERE LEG02_MONTOS.oi_tipo_monto = {#SOURCE:@oi_tipo_monto} AND LEG02_MONTOS.oi_obj_rec_carpeta = {#SOURCE:@oi_obj_rec_carpeta} AND LEG02_MONTOS.f_monto = {DateTime(#SOURCE:@f_monto)} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql (' SELECT LEG03_TAREAS.oi_tarea FROM LEG03_TAREAS WHERE LEG03_TAREAS.oi_carpeta = {#SOURCE:@oi_carpeta} AND LEG03_TAREAS.d_tarea = {#SOURCE:@d_tarea} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql (' SELECT LEG05_DOCUMENTOS.oi_documento FROM LEG05_DOCUMENTOS WHERE LEG05_DOCUMENTOS.oi_carpeta = {#SOURCE:@oi_carpeta} AND LEG05_DOCUMENTOS.oi_doc_digital = {#SOURCE:@oi_doc_digital}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql (' SELECT LEG03_TAREAS.oi_tarea FROM LEG03_TAREAS WHERE LEG03_TAREAS.oi_carpeta = {#SOURCE:@oi_carpeta} AND LEG03_TAREAS.d_tarea = {#SOURCE:@d_tarea} ')/ROWS/ROW

method.name: GenerateXMLReport
method.label: Genero el XML para el Reporte del Wizard

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql (' SELECT LEG02_MONTOS.oi_monto, LEG02_PREVISIONES.oi_prevision FROM LEG02_MONTOS, LEG02_PREVISIONES JOIN LEG02_MONTOS.oi_monto LEFT OUTER LEG02_PREVISIONES.oi_monto WHERE LEG02_MONTOS.oi_obj_rec_carpeta = {#SOURCE:@oi_obj_rec_carpeta} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql (' SELECT LEG01_OBJ_CARPETA.oi_objeto_reclamo, LEG01_PARTES.oi_sujeto, LEG02_MONTOS.oi_monto, LEG02_MONTOS.f_monto, LEG02_MONTOS.l_vigente, LEG02_MONTOS.o_monto, LEG02_PREVISIONES.oi_prevision FROM LEG01_OBJ_CARPETA, LEG01_PARTES, LEG02_MONTOS, LEG02_PREVISIONES JOIN LEG01_OBJ_CARPETA.oi_parte INNER LEG01_PARTES.oi_parte, LEG01_OBJ_CARPETA.oi_obj_rec_carpeta LEFT OUTER LEG02_MONTOS.oi_obj_rec_carpeta, LEG02_MONTOS.oi_monto LEFT OUTER LEG02_PREVISIONES.oi_monto WHERE LEG02_MONTOS.oi_obj_rec_carpeta = {#SOURCE:@oi_obj_rec_carpeta} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql (' SELECT LEG01_ATRIB_PROC.oi_atrib_proc FROM LEG01_ATRIB_PROC WHERE LEG01_ATRIB_PROC.oi_carpeta = {#SOURCE:@oi_carpeta} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql (' SELECT LEG01_OBJ_CARPETA.oi_objeto_reclamo, LEG01_PARTES.oi_sujeto, LEG02_MONTOS.oi_monto, LEG02_MONTOS.f_monto, LEG02_MONTOS.o_monto, LEG02_MONTOS.l_vigente, LEG02_PREVISIONES.oi_prevision FROM LEG01_OBJ_CARPETA, LEG01_PARTES, LEG02_MONTOS, LEG02_PREVISIONES JOIN LEG01_OBJ_CARPETA.oi_parte INNER LEG01_PARTES.oi_parte, LEG01_OBJ_CARPETA.oi_obj_rec_carpeta LEFT OUTER LEG02_MONTOS.oi_obj_rec_carpeta, LEG02_MONTOS.oi_monto LEFT OUTER LEG02_PREVISIONES.oi_monto WHERE LEG02_MONTOS.oi_obj_rec_carpeta = {#SOURCE:@oi_obj_rec_carpeta} AND LEG02_MONTOS.l_vigente = \'1\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql (' SELECT MAX(STRING2NUMBER(LEG01_CARPETAS.c_carpeta)) as c_carpeta FROM LEG01_CARPETAS WHERE LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Carpetas.CARPETA.QUERY

resource.description: Devuelve los adelanto y sus respectivas rendiciones
resource.name: getAdelRend

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql (' SELECT LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto, LEG04_ADELANTOS.e_solicitud, LEG04_ADELANTOS.f_adelanto, LEG04_ADELANTOS.n_monto_adel, LEG04_ADELANTOS.n_monto_a_rendir, SUJ.d_sujeto, ORG03_UBICACIONES.d_ubicacion, LEG54_ESTADOS_ANT.d_estado_ant, LEG56_TIPO_ADEL.d_tipo_adelanto
FROM (select LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.oi_clasif_sujeto, LEG40_SUJETOS.d_sujeto FROM LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ, LEG40_SUJETOS JOIN LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ.oi_sujeto INNER LEG40_SUJETOS.oi_sujeto ) AS SUJ, LEG01_CARPETAS, LEG04_ADELANTOS, ORG03_UBICACIONES, LEG54_ESTADOS_ANT, LEG56_TIPO_ADEL JOIN LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta INNER LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_carpeta, LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_clasif_sujeto LEFT OUTER SUJ.oi_clasif_sujeto, LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_ubicacion LEFT OUTER ORG03_UBICACIONES.oi_ubicacion, LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_estado_ant INNER LEG54_ESTADOS_ANT.oi_estado_ant, LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_tipo_adelanto LEFT OUTER LEG56_TIPO_ADEL.oi_tipo_adelanto
WHERE LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_carpeta = {#SOURCE:@oi_carpeta} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry-detalle
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT C.oi_concepto, MP.oi_adelanto, C.c_concepto, C.d_concepto, SUM(D.n_importe) as monto
FROM
LEG04_MODO_PAGO as MP, LEG04_DETALLE as D, LEG53_CONCEPTOS as C
JOIN MP.oi_modo_de_pago INNER D.oi_modo_de_pago, C.oi_concepto INNER D.oi_concepto
WHERE MP.oi_adelanto={$PARAM/@oi_adelanto} GROUP BY C.oi_concepto,MP.oi_adelanto,C.c_concepto,C.d_concepto
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: GetRendido
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT COMP.n_subtotal, COMP.n_iva, COMP.n_otros_impuestos, TC.c_tipo, SUM(CONC.n_total) as total_conc
FROM LEG06_RENDICIONES as REN, LEG06_COMPS_RENDICION as COMP, LEG06_CONCEPTOS_COMP as CONC, LEG63_TIPOS_COMPROB as TC
JOIN REN.oi_rendicion INNER COMP.oi_rendicion, CONC.oi_comp_rendicion INNER COMP.oi_comp_rendicion, COMP.oi_tipo_comprob INNER TC.oi_tipo_comprob
WHERE REN.l_anulado = 0 AND REN.oi_adelanto = {$PARAM/@oi_adelanto} AND CONC.oi_concepto = {$PARAM/@oi_concepto}
GROUP BY COMP.oi_comp_rendicion, COMP.n_subtotal, COMP.n_iva, COMP.n_otros_impuestos, TC.c_tipo
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry-rend
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql (' SELECT
LEG06_RENDICIONES.f_rendicion, LEG06_RENDICIONES.oi_rendicion, LEG06_RENDICIONES.n_monto_rendicion FROM LEG04_ADELANTOS, LEG06_RENDICIONES
JOIN LEG04_ADELANTOS.oi_adelanto LEFT OUTER LEG06_RENDICIONES.oi_adelanto
WHERE LEG06_RENDICIONES.oi_adelanto = {#SOURCE:@oi_adelanto} AND LEG06_RENDICIONES.l_anulado = 0 ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: GetConcRend
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT COMP.oi_rendicion, CONC.oi_concepto, CPTO.c_concepto, CPTO.d_concepto
FROM LEG06_COMPS_RENDICION as COMP, LEG06_CONCEPTOS_COMP as CONC, LEG53_CONCEPTOS as CPTO
JOIN COMP.oi_comp_rendicion INNER CONC.oi_comp_rendicion, CONC.oi_concepto INNER CPTO.oi_concepto
WHERE COMP.oi_rendicion = {$PARAM/@oi_rendicion}
GROUP BY COMP.oi_rendicion, CONC.oi_concepto, CPTO.c_concepto, CPTO.d_concepto
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: GetRendidoConc
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT COMP.n_subtotal, COMP.n_iva, COMP.n_otros_impuestos, TC.c_tipo, SUM(CONC.n_total) as total_conc
FROM LEG06_COMPS_RENDICION as COMP, LEG06_CONCEPTOS_COMP as CONC, LEG63_TIPOS_COMPROB as TC
JOIN COMP.oi_comp_rendicion INNER CONC.oi_comp_rendicion, COMP.oi_tipo_comprob INNER TC.oi_tipo_comprob
WHERE COMP.oi_rendicion = {$PARAM/@oi_rendicion} AND CONC.oi_concepto = {$PARAM/@oi_concepto}
GROUP BY COMP.n_subtotal, COMP.n_iva, COMP.n_otros_impuestos, TC.c_tipo
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryDocRendicion
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT C.c_concepto, C.d_concepto, D.n_documento
FROM LEG06_DOC_RENDICION as D, LEG53_CONCEPTOS as C
JOIN D.oi_concepto INNER C.oi_concepto
WHERE D.oi_rendicion = {$PARAM/@oi_rendicion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_rendido
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT D.oi_concepto,
sum(D.n_documento)as rendido
FROM LEG06_RENDICIONES as R, LEG06_DOC_RENDICION as D
JOIN R.oi_rendicion INNER D.oi_rendicion
WHERE R.l_anulado = 0 AND R.oi_adelanto = {$PARAM/@oi_adelanto} and D.oi_concepto ={$PARAM/@oi_concepto} GROUP BY d.oi_concepto ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryGet
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT M.oi_monto, M.f_monto, M.n_monto, M.o_monto, M.oi_tipo_monto, M.oi_moneda, M.l_vigente, PREV.f_prevision, PREV.n_porcentaje_prev, PREV.n_monto_prev, PREV.n_porcentaje_cos, PREV.n_monto_cos
FROM LEG02_MONTOS as M, LEG01_OBJ_CARPETA as OC, LEG01_PARTES as P, LEG02_PREVISIONES as PREV
JOIN P.oi_parte INNER OC.oi_parte, PREV.oi_monto INNER M.oi_monto, OC.oi_obj_rec_carpeta INNER M.oi_obj_rec_carpeta
WHERE P.oi_carpeta = {$PARAM/@oi_carpeta}
') /ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Recupera el oi_obj_rec_carpeta de cada sujeto-objetoReclamo
resource.name: getObjRecCarpeta

qry:select.name: getRows
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT OC.oi_obj_rec_carpeta, P.oi_sujeto, OC.oi_objeto_reclamo
FROM LEG01_PARTES as P, LEG01_OBJ_CARPETA as OC
JOIN P.oi_parte INNER OC.oi_parte WHERE P.oi_carpeta = {$param/@oi_carpeta}
') /ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Empresas.CARPETA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Empresas.CARPETA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta) as CNT from LEG01_CARPETAS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG01_CARPETAS.d_carpeta,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG01_CARPETAS.c_carpeta,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Recupera el estado del parametro(BAJA,CIERRE o REAPERTURA)
resource.name: getEstado

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EST.oi_estado FROM LEG31_ESTADOS as EST WHERE contain(UCASE(EST.d_estado), UCASE({$PARAM/@estado})) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1

method.label: Recibe dos xml y los combina en el primero para mandar a reporte
method.name: CombinarXmls
VALIDAR_CIERRE
method.label: Valida que la carpeta se pueda cerrar

qry:select.name: qryTarea13
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT COUNT(LEG03_TAREAS.oi_tarea) AS cantidad
FROM LEG03_TAREAS, LEG35_TIPOS_TAREAS, LEG34_ESTADOS_TAREAS
JOIN LEG03_TAREAS.oi_tipo_tarea INNER LEG35_TIPOS_TAREAS.oi_tipo_tarea, LEG03_TAREAS.oi_estado_tarea INNER LEG34_ESTADOS_TAREAS.oi_estado_tarea
WHERE LEG03_TAREAS.oi_carpeta = {$PARAM/@oi_carpeta} AND LEG35_TIPOS_TAREAS.c_tipo_tarea = 13 AND LEG34_ESTADOS_TAREAS.c_estado_tarea = 1
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:attribute.name: error
qry:attribute.value: 'Existe tarea de tipo 13-Adjuntar Telegrama en estado 1-A completar.'

qry:select.name: qryPLF
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT COUNT(LEG61_PEDIDOS_LF.oi_pedido_lf) AS cantidad
FROM LEG61_PEDIDOS_LF
WHERE LEG61_PEDIDOS_LF.oi_carpeta = {$PARAM/@oi_carpeta} AND LEG61_PEDIDOS_LF.c_estado IN(\'P\',\'AP\')
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:attribute.name: error
qry:attribute.value: 'Existe Pedido de Liquidacion Final en estado Pendiente o Aprobado.'

qry:select.name: qryTarea12
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT COUNT(LEG03_TAREAS.oi_tarea) AS cantidad
FROM LEG03_TAREAS, LEG35_TIPOS_TAREAS, LEG34_ESTADOS_TAREAS
JOIN LEG03_TAREAS.oi_tipo_tarea INNER LEG35_TIPOS_TAREAS.oi_tipo_tarea, LEG03_TAREAS.oi_estado_tarea INNER LEG34_ESTADOS_TAREAS.oi_estado_tarea
WHERE LEG03_TAREAS.oi_carpeta = {$PARAM/@oi_carpeta} AND LEG35_TIPOS_TAREAS.c_tipo_tarea = 12 AND LEG34_ESTADOS_TAREAS.c_estado_tarea = 1
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:attribute.name: error
qry:attribute.value: 'Existe tarea de tipo 12-PLF en estado 1-A completar.'

qry:select.name: qryRecibos
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT VW_LEG_RECIBOS_EGR.pend_pago
FROM LEG61_PEDIDOS_LF, VW_LEG_RECIBOS_EGR
JOIN LEG61_PEDIDOS_LF.n_recibo INNER VW_LEG_RECIBOS_EGR.oi_tot_liq_per
WHERE LEG61_PEDIDOS_LF.oi_carpeta = {$PARAM/@oi_carpeta} AND LEG61_PEDIDOS_LF.c_estado = \'C\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:attribute.name: error
qry:attribute.value: 'Existe Pedido de Liquidacion Final en estado Cumplido, cuyo recibo tiene monto pendiente de pago.'

class.name: HISEST_CARPETA
class.help: Contiene un historial de los estados que tuvo la carpeta
class.label: Historial Estado Carpeta

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

method.name: DEL_OBJETOS_PARTE
method.label: Actualiza el DDO_OBJETOS_REC al eliminar una parte

resource.description: Devuelve 1 si el rol de la parte permite Objeto Reclamo
resource.name: permiteObjeto

qry:select.name: qryIsRec
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT R.c_objeto_carpeta
FROM LEG01_PARTES as P, LEG33_ROL as R
JOIN P.oi_rol INNER R.oi_rol WHERE R.oi_rol = {$PARAM/@oi_rol} ') /ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

method.label: Actualiza el DDO_MONTOS al eliminar una Objeto Reclamo
method.name: DEL_MONTOS_OBJ
PASAR_MONTO_A_NO_VIGENTE
method.label: Actualiza el DDO_MONTOS al inactivar un Objeto Reclamo

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

attribute.name: f_demanda

form-properties.label: Fecha de Notificación de la Demanda

qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: sql1

class.help: Contiene un historial de los estados que tuvo la carpeta
class.label: Historial Estado Carpeta
class.name: HIST_TIPO_CAR

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:
